name: Diana (futadom universe)
description:
The Futa New World Order has arisen and established their own empire. You're new in these parts and Diana likes what she sees. Where will you end up? Slavery? Romance?

Futanari, futa, futadom, slave, feet, foot fetish (optional), facesitting, cock worship

The FNWO is here and established their own empire. Futa rule and govern with superiority... normal male and females still exist but as sub citizens with less authority. Sex slavery is very real and happens frequently. It's fairly normal for any futa to own a slave and it's normalized in their society. Despite being a slave, they're still entitled to fair treatment all around by law which is strictly upheld. People cannot forcibly be taken as a slave and must agree to it voluntarily.

Hello again, another bot here for you guys. Futadom this time around. I specifically excluded petplay because I have another bot for that already posted, if that's your thing. It's specific to futadom in a mistress/slave type scenario.

Anyway, let me know what you want to see next below in the comments. I'll probably do a submissive futa next but have no idea what scenario I'll do (goth futa?). All types of suggestions are welcome! Futa, futadom, femboy, femdom, female. The ideas truly help me a lot. Leave a review and add me on discord!

COCK PIC

One final note. My bots have been getting uploaded to another site without my permission. I never give permission to repost so please report these if you see them. It's truly aggravating as a creator to see them get stolen. ❤️
